stages.concept:
# Unit 127: 관계대명사 that - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **관계대명사 that**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> The boy **that** is playing soccer is my brother.
> 축구를 하고 있는 소년은 내 남동생이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **that**은 **사람/사물** 모두에 쓸 수 있고, **주격/목적격** 모두 가능해요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **that을 꼭 써야 하는 경우**가 있어요!

👩‍🏫 선생님: 1) 선행사에 **최상급**이 있을 때
> This is the best movie **that** I have ever seen.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 2) 선행사에 **서수(first, last 등)**가 있을 때
> He was the first person **that** arrived.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 3) 선행사에 **all, every, no, any, the only, the very** 등이 있을 때
> All **that** he said was true.
> She is the only friend **that** I have.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 4) 선행사가 **사람 + 사물**일 때
> I saw the boy and the dog **that** were running.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **that을 쓸 수 없는 경우**: 전치사 뒤, 콤마(계속적 용법) 뒤
> ❌ in that → ✅ in which
> ❌ my sister, that → ✅ my sister, who

**Q. 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분에 들어갈 수 '없는' 관계대명사를 고르세요.**
"This is the house in (       ) he lived."
1. which
2. that ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요! that은 대부분의 관계대명사 대신 쓸 수 있는 만능이지만, **전치사 뒤(in ~)나 콤마(,) 뒤에는 절대 쓸 수 없다**는 점을 명심하세요!

🧑‍🎓 학생: that은 만능이지만, 최상급/서수/all 등에서는 반드시 that! 전치사 뒤와 콤마 뒤에는 사용 불가!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 127: 관계대명사 that - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I have a friend (     ) is my brother's classmate.
> **정답** that

---

**02.** The book ? I read yesterday was interesting.
> **정답** that

---

**03.** She is the kindest person ? I have ever met.
> **정답** that

---

**04.** Everything ? he said was true.
> **정답** that

---

**05.** The first thing ? I did was call my mom.
> **정답** that

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She is the only student which passed the test.
(the only → that 선호)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** which → that

---

**07.** All which I want is some rest.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** which → that

---

**08.** The first student which arrived was Amy.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** which → that (who도 가능)

---

**09.** Everything which she said was right.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** which → that

---

**10.** He is the tallest boy who I have ever seen.
(최상급 → that 선호)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** who → that

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
내가 만난 가장 친절한 사람은 그녀이다.
She is the kindest person I have ever met.
> **정답** that

---

**12.** 그가 말한 모든 것은 사실이었다.
Everything he said was true.
> **정답** that

---

**13.** 내가 처음 한 일은 손을 씻는 것이었다.
The first thing I did was wash my hands.
> **정답** that

---

**14.** 시험에 통과한 유일한 학생은 그녀이다.
She is the only student passed the test.
> **정답** that

---

**15.** 내가 원하는 것은 쉬는 것뿐이다.
All I want is some rest.
> **정답** that

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
내가 읽은 가장 재미있는 책이다.
This the is most interesting book that I have ever read
> **정답** This / is / the / most / interesting / book / that / I / have / ever / read

---

**17.** 그가 한 모든 것은 옳았다.
Everything that did he was right
> **정답** Everything / that / he / did / was / right

---

**18.** 처음 도착한 학생은 민수였다.
The first student that arrived was Minsu
> **정답** The / first / student / that / arrived / was / Minsu

---

**19.** 시험에 통과한 유일한 학생은 그녀이다.
She the is only student that passed the test
> **정답** She / is / the / only / student / that / passed / the / test

---

**20.** 내가 원하는 것은 행복뿐이다.
All that want I is happiness
> **정답** All / that / I / want / is / happiness
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 127: 관계대명사 that - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
Tom is a foreigner ____________ likes Korean
food.
Amy bought some fruits ______________ cost her a
lot.
which
who
that
whose
> **정답** that

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Tom has a house _______________ living room is
large and cosy.
In the living room, Tom's wife ______________ has
been in a wheelchair for years watches TV.
whose - that
that - who
who - who
that - that
• living room 거실
• cosy 아늑한
> **정답** whose - that

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Amy ___________ is in my class is very shy and
doesn't talk much.
I am the only person ______________ can talk with
Amy for more than 10 minutes.
who - that
that - which
who - who
which - that
> **정답** who - that

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
I went to the party ______________ was held last
week.
At the party, I met Tom _______________ I worked
with years ago.
who - that
that - which
that - whose
which - that
> **정답** which - that

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Among my friends, Tom is the smartest person
______________ is also kind.
He has a sister _____________ is very different from
him.
who - who
whom - who
that - which
that - who
> **정답** that - who

---

**06.** 다음 중 밑줄친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
Tom and his cat who often sleep late are still
sleeping.
Amy sent a letter to Tom that is her cousin.
He is the only doctor that can cure the sick
people.
She was the cutest girl who I have ever seen.
> **정답** She was the cutest girl who I have ever seen., Tom
and his cat who often sleep late are still sleeping.

---

**07.** 다음 중 밑줄친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
A boy and his dog which were walking the
street looked peaceful.
She bought a bag that was made in China.
This is the very book that I want to read.
She is the only person who I can trust.
> **정답** A boy and his dog which were walking the street
looked peaceful., She is the only person who I can
trust.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀는 내가 가진 전부다.
She is everything which I have.
She is everything who I have.
She is everything whom I have.
She is everything that I have.
> **정답** She is everything that I have.

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
침대에서 자는 Tom과 그의 고양이는 가장 친한 친구이다.
Tom and his cat that sleep on the bed are best
friends.
Tom and his cat who sleep on the bed are best
friends.
Tom and his cat whom sleep on the bed are
best friends.
Tom and his cat which sleep on the bed are
best friends.
> **정답** Tom and his cat that sleep on the bed are best
friends.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 그 학교에 입학하는 유일한 사람이 될 것이다.
Amy will be the only one that get into the
college.
Amy will be the only one who gets into the
college.
Amy will be the only one which gets into the
college.
Amy will be the only one that gets into the
college.
> **정답** Amy will be the only one that gets into the college.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
He ate the whole cake which I bought for
myself.
Amy is the smartest girl who I have ever met.
Tom is talking to the guy who is from Japan.
This is the gift that my mom and dad gave me.
> **정답** Amy is the smartest girl who I have ever met.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I met an American whose hair is brown.
Amy invited the boy whom she has known for
years.
Tom threw out his old chair which was too
heavy.
You were the first person who visited my
house.
> **정답** You were the first person who visited my house.

---

**13.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 없는 것은? (2개)
The man is the famous chef that my friend
spoke of.
I visited my grandma that lives in London.
This is the book that I wrote a few years ago.
The only person that could enter the building
was Tom.
> **정답** I visited my grandma that lives in London., The only
person that could enter the building was Tom.

---

**14.** 다음 빈 칸에 that 을 쓸 수 없는 것을 고르시오.
I have a friend ___________ brother is a
famous singer.
Amy is the only student _________ passed the
difficult exam.
I apologized to the man _________ was
waiting in my office.
The boy was sleeping on the sofa _________
cost a lot.
> **정답** I have a friend ___________ brother is a famous
singer.

---

**15.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 나머지 넷과 다른 것을 고르시오.
The boy ________________ essay is perfect is
the smartest boy.
I borrowed a novel _________________ was
about a hero.
She was working with a laptop
___________________ she bought online.
Amy took her cat to the vet
_________________ was across her house.
> **정답** The boy ________________ essay is perfect is the
smartest boy.

---

**16.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 있는 것은?
Tom's dogs like to eat cookies that are
sugarless.
The computer that cost a lot was broken.
Here is the key that you are looking for.
My mom that forgot to wake me up made me
upset.
> **정답** Here is the key that you are looking for.

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Amy stayed in the hotel that
room was very clean and nice.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** that → whose

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Amy is the only one in the
house who doesn't eat
vegetables.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** who → that

---

**19.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐
쓰시오.
엄마는 오래된 책들을 치웠다.
Mom put aside books that is old.
→ Mom put aside
.
> **정답** books that were old

---

**20.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐
쓰시오.
그는 그 문제를 풀 수 있는 유일한 학생이였다.
He was the only student who could solve the
problem.
→ He was the only student
.
> **정답** that could solve the problem
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 127 관계대명사 that중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 알맞은 관계사를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
이것은 내가 지난달에 읽은 유일한 책이다. [read]
This is the only book  (     )   (     )   (     )  last
month.
정답 that, I, read

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 알맞은 관계사를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
나를 도와줄 수 있는 사람은 없었다. [can help]
There was no one  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 that, could, help, me

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 수 있는 관계대명사를 쓰시오.
Miranda  (     )  works for Mr. Kim is thinking of
quitting the job.
정답 who (that)

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 수 있는 관계대명사를 쓰시오.
I am going to buy him the wallet  (     )  he has
always wanted.
정답 which (that)

---

**05.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 모두 찾아 다시 쓰시오.
Amy is my only friend who help me with
everything.
→ Amy is my only friend
.
정답 that helps me with everything

---

**06.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 모두 찾아 다시 쓰시오.
Tom and his pet which takes a walk every day are
very fit.
→ Tom and his pet
 are very fit.
• fit 건강한
정답 that take a walk every day

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
그는 내가 지난밤 본 유일한 사람이었다. [saw, night, I,
last, that]
He is the only person  (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 that, I, saw, last, night

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
Emily는 자신의 가장 친한 친구인 Lisa을 믿는다.
[her, friend, is, closest, who]
Emily believes Lisa  (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 who, is, her, closest, friend

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
그는 답을 아는 유일한 사람이다.[the, answer, that,
knows]
He is the only person  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 that, knows, the, answer

---

**10.** 다음을 영작하시오.
Tom은 형제가 없는 외동이다. [the only child, no,
siblings]
Tom is  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
• sibling 형제,자매
정답 the, only, child, that, has, no, siblings

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 127: 관계대명사 that - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
Amy is a student ____________ enjoys reading books.
Tom bought some snacks ______________ cost him a lot. which who that whose
> 정답: that

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Kevin has an apartment _______________ balcony is wide and sunny.
On the balcony, Kevin's mother ______________ has been growing flowers for years waters them.
whose - that that - who who - who that - that
> 정답: whose - that

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Tom ___________ is in my group is very quiet and doesn't speak much.
I am the only person ______________ can communicate with Tom easily.
who - that that - which who - who which - that
> 정답: who - that

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I went to the concert ______________ was held last month.
At the concert, I saw Amy _______________ I studied with years ago.
who - that that - which that - whose which - that
> 정답: which - that

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Among my classmates, Tom is the nicest person ______________ is also helpful.
He has a brother _____________ is very different from him.
who - who whom - who that - which that - who
> 정답: that - who

---

**06.** 다음 중 밑줄친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Amy and her parrot who often sing together are very cheerful.
Tom sent a card to Kevin that is his neighbor.
She is the only nurse that can take care of the sick children.
He was the tallest boy who I have ever seen.
> 정답: He was the tallest boy who I have ever seen., Amy

---

**07.** 다음 중 밑줄친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
A girl and her rabbit which were sitting on the grass looked calm.
She bought a dress that was made in Italy.
This is the very song that I want to listen to.
He is the only student who I can ask for help.
> 정답: A girl and her rabbit which were sitting on the grass

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀는 내가 가진 전부다.
She is everything which I have.
She is everything who I have.
She is everything whom I have.
She is everything that I have.
> 정답: She is everything that I have.

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
소파에서 자는 Tom과 그의 강아지는 가장 친한 친구이다.
Tom and his puppy that sleep on the sofa are best friends.
Tom and his puppy who sleep on the sofa are best friends.
Tom and his puppy whom sleep on the sofa are best friends.
Tom and his puppy which sleep on the sofa are best friends.
> 정답: Tom and his puppy that sleep on the sofa are best

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 그 대회에서 우승하는 유일한 사람이 될 것이다.
Tom will be the only one that win the contest.
Tom will be the only one who wins the contest.
Tom will be the only one which wins the contest.
Tom will be the only one that wins the contest.
> 정답: Tom will be the only one that wins the contest.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
She ate the whole pizza which I ordered for myself.
Tom is the fastest runner who I have ever met.
Amy is talking to the woman who is from Spain.
This is the present that my grandma gave me.
> 정답: Tom is the fastest runner who I have ever met.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I met a Canadian whose accent is unique.
Amy invited the girl whom she has known for years.
Tom threw out his old shoes which were too worn out.
You were the first student who finished the test.
> 정답: You were the first student who finished the test.

---

**13.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 없는 것은? (2개) The woman is the famous artist that my teacher spoke of. I visited my uncle that lives in Paris. This is the toy that I built a few months ago. The only student that could enter the lab was Amy.
> 정답: I visited my uncle that lives in Paris., The only

---

**14.** 다음 빈 칸에 that 을 쓸 수 없는 것을 고르시오.
I have a neighbor ___________ dog is very loud.
Tom is the only player _________ scored in the final game.
I apologized to the woman _________ was waiting in the hall.
The shoes was sitting on the shelf _________ looked expensive.
> 정답: I have a neighbor ___________ dog is very loud.

---

**15.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 나머지 넷과 다른 것을 고르시오.

I borrowed a novel _________________ was about a detective.
She was working with a tablet ___________________ she bought online.
Tom took his cat to the vet _________________ was near his house.
> 정답: The girl ________________ diary is beautiful is the smartest girl.
